{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/home/user/workspace/app/admin/products/page.tsx","old_string":"export default async function AdminProductsPage() {","new_string":"/* ── Inline styles (keeps everything in one file) ───────────── */
const styles = {
  page: {
    padding: '2rem',
    fontFamily:
      'system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif',
    maxWidth: 1120,
    margin: '0 auto',
  },
  header: {
    display: 'flex',
    justifyContent: 'space-between',
    alignItems: 'flex-start',
    marginBottom: '1.5rem',
    flexWrap: 'wrap',
    gap: '1rem',
  },
  title: { fontSize: '1.5rem', fontWeight: 600, margin: 0 },
  meta: {
    fontSize: '0.8rem',
    color: '#6b7280',
    margin: '0.25rem 0 0 0',
  },
  syncButton: {
    padding: '0.6rem 1.25rem',
    background: '#2563eb',
    color: '#fff',
    border: 'none',
    borderRadius: 6,
    fontSize: '0.9rem',
    fontWeight: 500,
    cursor: 'pointer',
  },
  tableWrapper: {
    overflowX: 'auto' as const,
    border: '1px solid #e5e7eb',
    borderRadius: 8,
  },
  table: { width: '100%', borderCollapse: 'collapse' as const },
  th: {
    textAlign: 'left' as const,
    padding: '0.75rem 1rem',
    fontSize: '0.8rem',
    fontWeight: 600,
    textTransform: 'uppercase' as const,
    letterSpacing: '0.05em',
    color: '#6b7280',
    background: '#f9fafb',
    borderBottom: '1px solid #e5e7eb',
  },
  tr: { borderBottom: '1px solid #f3f4f6' },
  td: { padding: '0.75rem 1rem', fontSize: '0.9rem' },
  sku: {
    fontSize: '0.8rem',
    background: '#f3f4f6',
    padding: '0.15rem 0.4rem',
    borderRadius: 4,
  },
  categoryTag: (cat: string) => ({
    fontSize: '0.8rem',
    background:
      cat === 'Electronics'
        ? '#dbeafe'
        : cat === 'Audio'
          ? '#fce7f3'
          : '#ede9fe',
    color:
      cat === 'Electronics'
        ? '#1d4ed8'
        : cat === 'Audio'
          ? '#be185d'
          : '#6d28d9',
    padding: '0.15rem 0.5rem',
    borderRadius: 999,
  }),
  inventory: (p: { inventory: number }) => ({
    fontWeight: p.inventory === 0 ? 600 : 400,
    color: p.inventory === 0 ? '#dc2626' : '#16a34a',
  }),
  statusBadge: (status: string) => ({
    display: 'inline-block',
    fontSize: '0.8rem',
    padding: '0.15rem 0.5rem',
    borderRadius: 999,
    background:
      status === 'active'
        ? '#dcfce7'
        : status === 'out_of_stock'
          ? '#fef3c7'
          : '#f3f4f6',
    color:
      status === 'active'
        ? '#16a34a'
        : status === 'out_of_stock'
          ? '#d97706'
          : '#6b7280',
    textTransform: 'capitalize' as const,
  }),
};

export default async function AdminProductsPage() {"}

1	import { unstable_cache } from 'next/cache';
2	import { revalidateTag } from 'next/cache';
3	import { getAllProducts } from '@/lib/db';
4	
5	/* Dynamic rendering so cache-revalidated data is served fresh
6	   on the next request after a sync. The product data fetch itself
7	   is still cached via unstable_cache + "products" tag — this just
8	   prevents the entire page HTML from being baked at build time. */
9	export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';
10	
11	/* ── Cached data fetch ──────────────────────────────────────── */
12	const getCachedProducts = unstable_cache(
13	  async () => getAllProducts(),
14	  ['admin-products-list'],
15	  { tags: ['products'] },
16	);
17	
18	/* ── Page component ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
19	/* ── Inline styles (keeps everything in one file) ───────────── */
20	const styles = {
21	  page: {
22	    padding: '2rem',
23	    fontFamily:
24	      'system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif',
25	    maxWidth: 1120,
26	    margin: '0 auto',
27	  },
28	  header: {
29	    display: 'flex',
30	    justifyContent: 'space-between',
31	    alignItems: 'flex-start',
32	    marginBottom: '1.5rem',
33	    flexWrap: 'wrap' as const,
34	    gap: '1rem',
35	  },
36	  title: { fontSize: '1.5rem', fontWeight: 600, margin: 0 },
37	  meta: {
38	    fontSize: '0.8rem',
39	    color: '#6b7280',
40	    margin: '0.25rem 0 0 0',
41	  },
42	  syncButton: {
43	    padding: '0.6rem 1.25rem',
44	    background: '#2563eb',
45	    color: '#fff',
46	    border: 'none',
47	    borderRadius: 6,
48	    fontSize: '0.9rem',
49	    fontWeight: 500,
50	    cursor: 'pointer',
51	  },
52	  tableWrapper: {
53	    overflowX: 'auto' as const,
54	    border: '1px solid #e5e7eb',
55	    borderRadius: 8,
56	  },
57	  table: { width: '100%', borderCollapse: 'collapse' as const },
58	  th: {
59	    textAlign: 'left' as const,
60	    padding: '0.75rem 1rem',
61	    fontSize: '0.8rem',
62	    fontWeight: 600,
63	    textTransform: 'uppercase' as const,
64	    letterSpacing: '0.05em',
65	    color: '#6b7280',
66	    background: '#f9fafb',
67	    borderBottom: '1px solid #e5e7eb',
68	  },
69	  tr: { borderBottom: '1px solid #f3f4f6' },
70	  td: { padding: '0.75rem 1rem', fontSize: '0.9rem' },
71	  sku: {
72	    fontSize: '0.8rem',
73	    background: '#f3f4f6',
74	    padding: '0.15rem 0.4rem',
75	    borderRadius: 4,
76	  },
77	  categoryTag: (cat: string) => ({
78	    fontSize: '0.8rem',
79	    background:
80	      cat === 'Electronics'
81	        ? '#dbeafe'
82	        : cat === 'Audio'
83	          ? '#fce7f3'
84	          : '#ede9fe',
85	    color:
86	      cat === 'Electronics'
87	        ? '#1d4ed8'
88	        : cat === 'Audio'
89	          ? '#be185d'
90	          : '#6d28d9',
91	    padding: '0.15rem 0.5rem',
92	    borderRadius: 999,
93	  }),
94	  inventory: (p: { inventory: number }) => ({
95	    fontWeight: p.inventory === 0 ? 600 : 400,
96	    color: p.inventory === 0 ? '#dc2626' : '#16a34a',
97	  }),
98	  statusBadge: (status: string) => ({
99	    display: 'inline-block',
100	    fontSize: '0.8rem',
101	    padding: '0.15rem 0.5rem',
102	    borderRadius: 999,
103	    background:
104	      status === 'active'
105	        ? '#dcfce7'
106	        : status === 'out_of_stock'
107	          ? '#fef3c7'
108	          : '#f3f4f6',
109	    color:
110	      status === 'active'
111	        ? '#16a34a'
112	        : status === 'out_of_stock'
113	          ? '#d97706'
114	          : '#6b7280',
115	    textTransform: 'capitalize' as const,
116	  }),
117	};
118	
119	export default async function AdminProductsPage() {
